request.description:
## Register User

Creates a new user account by accepting a username and password. On success, returns a confirmation message along with the newly created user's ID.

---

## Request Details

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| **Method** | `POST` |
| **URL** | `http://localhost:3333/auth/register` |
| **Body Type** | `raw (JSON)` |

---

## Request Body Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | `string` | âś… Yes | The desired username for the new account |
| `password` | `string` | âś… Yes | The password for the new account |

---

## Sample Request Body

``` json
{
  "username": "nora",
  "password": "123456"
}

 ```

---

## Response Details

### Success â€” `201 Created`

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `message` | `string` | Confirmation message indicating successful registration |
| `userId` | `string` | The unique identifier of the newly created user |

---

## Sample Success Response

``` json
{
  "message": "User registered successfully",
  "userId": "6a182e12611b451057551034"
}

 ```

## Login User

Authenticates an existing user and returns a JWT token to be used for subsequent authenticated requests.

### Endpoint

`POST http://localhost:3333/auth/login`

### Request Body

Send a JSON object with the following fields:

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `username` | string | Yes | The username of the registered user |
| `password` | string | Yes | The user's password |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "username": "nora",
  "password": "123456"
}

 ```

### Response

**200 OK** â€” Login successful. Returns a JWT token.

``` json
{
  "message": "Login successful",
  "token": "<jwt_token>"
}

 ```

The returned `token` is a signed JWT (HS256) that expires 1 hour after issuance. Include it in the `Authorization` header as a Bearer token for protected endpoints.

### Notes

- Returns `401 Unauthorized` if the credentials are invalid.
    
- The token payload contains the user `id`, `username`, `iat` (issued at), and `exp` (expiry).

## Get All Posts

Retrieves a list of all posts available in the system. Returns an array of post objects, each containing details such as the title, content, publication status, author information, and creation timestamp.

---

### HTTP Method & URL

```
GET http://127.0.0.1:3333/posts

 ```

---

### Authentication

This endpoint is part of the **Auth API** project. Authentication may be required depending on the server configuration. If protected, include a valid Bearer token in the `Authorization` header:

```
Authorization: Bearer <your_token>

 ```

---

### Request Details

No parameters are required for this request.

| Type | Details |
| --- | --- |
| Headers | None required |
| Query Params | None |
| Request Body | None |

---

### Response Details

**Status:** `200 OK`

Returns a JSON **array** of post objects. Each object contains the following fields:

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `_id` | `string` | Unique identifier of the post |
| `title` | `string` | Title of the post |
| `content` | `string` | Body/content of the post |
| `published` | `boolean` | Whether the post is published (`true`/`false`) |
| `authorId` | `string` | Unique identifier of the post's author |
| `authorUsername` | `string` | Username of the post's author |
| `createdAt` | `string` | ISO 8601 timestamp of when the post was created |

---

### Sample Response

``` json
[
  {
    "_id": "6a18269c748add18b285b0d1",
    "title": "My first post",
    "content": "Hello, this is my post",
    "published": true,
    "authorId": "6a1825de748add18b285b0d0",
    "authorUsername": "lora",
    "createdAt": "2026-05-28T11:27:24.136Z"
  }
]

 ```

Creates a new post for the authenticated user.

**Endpoint:** `POST http://127.0.0.1:3333/posts`

**Authentication:** Required (use a valid Bearer token in the Authorization header).

**Request Body (JSON):**

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| title | string | Yes | The title of the post |
| content | string | Yes | The body/content of the post |
| published | boolean | Yes | Whether the post should be publicly visible |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
  "title": "My first post",
  "content": "This is my first protected post",
  "published": true
}

 ```

**Success Response (201 Created):**

``` json
{
  "message": "Post created successfully",
  "postId": "<generated-post-id>"
}

 ```
